title: Create: Numismatics Wallets
description: A wallet for easy coin management from Create: Numismatics
body:
THIS IS A FORK OF THE [WALLETS](https://modrinth.com/mod/wallets) MOD

This mod adds wallets for convenient management of coins from Create: Numismatics

![Wallet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d3abcc6bca58d9307453dc3216dc7f20d0720.png)

- Deposit all your money into the wallet balance
- Withdraw currency of any denomination singly from the balance
- Enter a fixed amount and the wallet dispenses the required sum in currency
- Turn a fixed amount into a "pouch" for easy transfer to players
